author: instapaper
description: Sync notes and highlights from Instapaper.

manifest.author: Instapaper
manifest.description: Sync notes and highlights from Instapaper.
manifest.name: Instapaper

name: Instapaper

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
### Changed

- Build and packaging improvements

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
### Added

- Block identifiers for highlights using Obsidian's block reference syntax (`^h{highlight_id}`).
- Customizable article properties: choose which properties to include and rename them to match your preferred naming scheme.
- Customizable notes templates: use [Mustache](https://mustache.github.io/) templates to fully control how highlights appear in your notes.

### Changed

- Minimum Obsidian version requirement updated to 1.11.0 for access to new API features.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/1.1.5...1.2.0

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* mergeOptions expects both arguments to be objects by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/166

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/1.1.4...1.1.5

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* Stop sync if we encounter too many errors by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/153
* Fall back to a default name if our title is empty by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/154
* Use Keymap.isModifier to detect resync key by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/155
* Improve error handling for sync operations by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/156

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/1.1.3...1.1.4

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add "Sync" context menu item to notes folder by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/77

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/1.1.2...1.1.3

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Replace *all* runs of spaces with hyphens by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/76

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/1.1.1...1.1.2

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Replace spaces with hyphens in tag names by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/74
* Obsidian tags cannot be entirely numeric by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/75

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add 'tags' property to synchronized notes by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/73

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/1.0.7...1.1.0

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Use Moment for timestamp formatting by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/67
* Minify the production build artifact (main.js) by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/68
* Use sentence case consistently in settings descriptions by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/69
* Disable console logging in production builds by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/70

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/1.0.6...1.0.7

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Also strip " (quote) characters from filenames by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/56
* Catch file system errors in notes sync by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/57


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/1.0.5...1.0.6

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* More specific "update" notice messages by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/52
* Replace Windows special characters with empty string by @Donohue in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/55


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/1.0.4...1.0.5

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Don't send body data with GET requests by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/51

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/1.0.3...1.0.4

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Switch to create-hmac for HMAC generation by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/49


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:

* Change link symbol to NORTH EAST ARROW by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/46


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1

releases.description:

* Official 1.0.0 release

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/0.8.0...1.0.0

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add "Save to Instapaper" to URL-based menus by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/34

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/0.7.1...0.8.0

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix settings migration from initial (empty) state by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/33

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/0.7.0...0.7.1

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Update to version 1.5.7 of the Obsidian API by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/30
* Implement Plugin.onExternalSettingsChange by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/31
* Generalize the sync operation by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/32


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/0.6.3...0.7.0

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Include macos and windows in the testing matrix by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/24
* Simplify account prompts to "Email" and "Password" by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/26
* Await connection and disconnection promises by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/27


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/0.6.2...0.6.3

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Hide most settings until an account is connected by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/23

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/0.6.1...0.6.2

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Apply feedback from Obsidian plugin review by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/21

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/0.6.0...0.6.1

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Sync notes after connecting an account by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/11
* Truncate titles to 250 characters by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/12
* Improve notes sync error handling by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/13
* Briefly delay the "notes sync on start" operation by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/14
* Format note timestamps as ISO-style date strings by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/15
* Rename the existing notes folder on settings change by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/16

## New Contributors
* @jparise made their first contribution in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/11

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/compare/0.5.0...0.6.0

releases.author: jparise
releases.description:

* Truncate titles to 250 characters by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/12
* Improve notes sync error handling by @jparise in https://github.com/Instapaper/obsidian-instapaper/pull/13
